raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 1223 establishes a first-of-its-kind right to privacy for an individual's neural data.",
    "Senate Bill 1223 defines neural data as sensitive personal information, ensuring it receives the same legal protections as biometric data, health records, and financial information.",
    "The legislation mandates that individuals must provide informed consent before any processing of their neural data occurs.",
    "Violations of the protections outlined in SB 1223 will result in significant penalties.",
    "SB 1223 aims to safeguard the privacy and autonomy of individuals in an age of rapid technological advancement.",
    "This legislation sets a precedent that could influence national and global discussions surrounding digital privacy rights."
```
